title: As pedestrian deaths decline in New Mexico, cyclist deaths double to highest number in 20 years - Albuquerque Journal
summary: While pedestrian fatalities decrease, cyclist deaths in New Mexico have surged to a 20-year high, raising concerns about road safety.

title: Dark Trip Game Update: New Room Released
summary: The latest update to Dark Trip introduces the 15th escape room, enhancing gameplay with new puzzles and challenges.

title: Developers Are Building Impressive Apps For Meta Ray-Ban Display's HUD & Neural Band
summary: Meta's recent update allows developers to create visual apps for the Ray-Ban Display, expanding its functionality significantly.

title: Transparent LED Railings Enhance Pedestrian Safety in Gwangju
summary: APS DNL has installed transparent LED railings on the Opo Pedestrian Overpass in Gwangju to enhance safety and visibility.

title: Everything Announced At The UploadVR Showcase - Summer 2026
summary: The UploadVR Showcase revealed an exciting lineup of over 30 mixed and virtual reality games, catering to diverse player interests.

title: St. Augustine Seawall Project Launch
summary: The St. Augustine seawall project is set to begin on June 15, enhancing coastal resilience and safety.

title: Traffic Light Installation at Personette and Fairview
summary: A new traffic light is being installed at the intersection of Personette and Fairview to enhance safety for drivers and pedestrians.

title: Vision Zero Summit Aims to Enhance Traffic Safety
summary: The Vision Zero Summit unites community members to enhance traffic safety efforts. This initiative aims to reduce traffic-related fatalities and injuries.

title: Cleveland's Pedestrian Safety Ranking
summary: Cleveland has been recognized as one of the safest large metropolitan areas for pedestrians. This ranking highlights the city's commitment to improving walkability and safety for its residents.

title: Geometric Framework for Pose and Velocity Estimation
summary: A new geometric framework improves absolute pose and velocity estimation using event cameras, crucial for robotics and AR applications.

title: Bakersfield ranked 3rd deadliest metro for pedestrians in US: report - KGET.com
summary: A recent report highlights Bakersfield as the third deadliest metro area for pedestrians in the U.S., raising concerns about urban safety.

title: Human Perception vs. AI in Content Moderation
summary: A recent study reveals that human perception can identify harmful content that AI systems miss, highlighting a critical gap in automated moderation.

title: New Pedestrian Safety Signs for City Crossings
summary: Two city crossings in Door County are set to receive new pedestrian safety signs to enhance safety for walkers.

title: William's Walk Highlights Pedestrian Safety
summary: The 2nd annual William's Walk in Memphis aims to raise awareness for pedestrian safety and support local efforts.

title: Lakewood Police Conduct AAA Pedestrian Safety Training
summary: Lakewood Police recently hosted a pedestrian safety training session in collaboration with AAA, focusing on improving officer awareness and response.

title: Community-Driven Pedestrian Safety Campaign in Maine
summary: A new pedestrian safety campaign has been launched in Portland, Lewiston, and Auburn, focusing on community involvement to enhance safety measures.

title: Traffic Study Recommends Safety Upgrades Near Moreau Heights School
summary: A recent traffic study highlights the need for enhanced pedestrian safety measures near Moreau Heights school in Jefferson City.

title: Stafford Township's Safe Routes to School Workshop
summary: A new workshop aims to enhance pedestrian safety for school routes in Stafford Township. Community input is crucial for effective planning.

title: Dynisma DMG-S Compact Driving Simulator
Valve Steam Frame Launch
Pico Project Swan Leak
Integrated Roadside Sensing and V2X for VRU Safety at Intersections
summary: A new framework combines multi-modal sensors, edge analytics, and V2X/P2X communication in a single cabinet to protect vulnerable road users at signalized intersections, addressing a critical gap in current systems.

title: FreqKD: Frequency-Decoupled Knowledge Distillation for IR Object Detection
summary: A new approach, FreqKD, tackles the challenge of transferring knowledge from RGB to infrared imagery for object detection. It decouples knowledge distillation by spatial frequency, recognizing varying alignment across low and high-frequency components.

title: Dash2Sim: Dashcam to Driving Simulation Framework
summary: A new framework, Dash2Sim, converts everyday dashcam videos into detailed 4D driving logs, enabling simulations to incorporate a far broader range of real-world scenarios, including rare events.

title: PersonaDrive Improves Human-Style Driving Simulation Performance
summary: The PersonaDrive pipeline improves closed-loop driving simulations by integrating human-style behavior, enhancing agent performance across driving styles.

title: West U Secures Federal Funding for Safety Plan
summary: West University has secured federal funding to enhance pedestrian safety measures in the area, aiming to reduce accidents and improve community safety.

title: Portland's New Pedestrian Safety Initiative
summary: Portland has introduced a new initiative aimed at enhancing pedestrian safety throughout the city. This program includes various strategies to reduce accidents and improve walkability.
